title: IAM Consultant
description:
The Identity and Access Management (IAM) Consultant is responsible for designing and delivering Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) solutions for external clients. This role translates business and security requirements into scalable IAM architectures, leads integration efforts, and provides strategic guidance throughout the IAM lifecycle.

Responsibilities:

• Work with end users, business analyst, developers, architects and team lead in developing IAM – IGA configurations based on requirements and solution design

• In-depth experience with IAM – IGA implementation standards and best practices for end-to-end integration with various target applications

• Evaluate system architecture and make recommendations as required

• Coordinate and collaborate with other project team members, including reporting to project manager throughout the project implementation to meet project goals

• Demonstrate experience troubleshooting complex multi-tiered application architectures with disparate middleware technologies

• Engage in the maintenance and support activities, which include perform troubleshooting, incident response, and patching in a timely manner

• Coordinate with vendors and support team on problem resolution, implementation issues and upgrades

• Create and maintain documentation for design specifications, installations, upgrades and test cases and operational maintenance

Requirements:

▪ Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Cybersecurity, Information Security, Computer Science, or related field

▪ Minimum solid 5 years of experience and in-depth knowledge in design, deployment, implementation and administration of Identity Governance and Administration related solutions, which include installation, configuration, clustering, hardening, tuning and troubleshooting, on products such as:

o IBM Security Verify Governance

o SailPoint (including IdentityIQ)

o Saviynt

o ForgeRock

o CyberArk

▪ 3 to 5 years of experience in IAM domain with hands-on experience in developing, implementing, or architecting SailPoint Identity Security Cloud (IdentityNow) solutions

▪ 2 to 3 years of experience with technical architecture, including integrating identity management and access governance software

▪ Experience in user life cycle management, access management and governance design and implementation

▪ Familiar with Joiner-Mover-Leaver (JML) processes and access rights provisioning, risk profiling, segregation of duty and certification setup.

▪ Experience in onboarding applications and integrating IGA solutions with various target systems using both out-of-the-box (OOTB) and custom connectors

▪ Strong understanding of secure communications for web applications (e.g. PKI, SSL)

▪ Broad exposure to a variety of other technologies (e.g. Server virtualization, database, network) with a firm understanding of the interdependencies between those technologies.

▪ Familiarity with HTTP, TCP/IP, load balancing and firewalls.

▪ Good understanding of identity analytics

▪ Familiarity with ITSM tools such as ServiceNow and Jira

▪ Understanding of Operating Systems (Windows, Unix, Linux)

▪ Knowledge of OutSystems is advantageous but not mandatory

▪ Must be able to work independently on the assignments – including communicating with end users/ project managers/ developers/ architects on information gathering and actual implementation.

▪ Ability to deal with changing priorities, multi-task, perform under pressure, and be a strong team player Knowledge in the following areas will be an advantage:

• Experience in implementation of other Identity and Access Management related solutions:

o Single sign-on solutions such as IBM Security Verify Access, Okta, etc

o Privilege Access Management solutions such as CyberArk

• Working skills in development and customisation, for example:

o Java development

o TDI assembly line development Basic scripting

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
